name: WpfReinforcementCatalog
summary: The WpfReinforcementCatalog class represents a group of controls to select rebars using the reinforcement catalog.

constructors.name: WpfReinforcementCatalog
constructors.summary: Initiates a new instance of the control.

constructors.name: WpfReinforcementCatalog
constructors.summary: Creates a new instance of the ReinforcementCatalog and will select in the tree the rebar that contains the given parameters (if possible).

methods.name: OnValueChanged
methods.summary: Event handler for passing generic catalog data back to dialog

properties.name: ButtonHeight
properties.summary: Gets and sets the height of the button control.

properties.name: ButtonText
properties.summary: Gets and sets the text of the button control.

properties.name: ButtonWidth
properties.summary: Gets and sets the width of the button control.

properties.name: SelectedRebarBendingRadius
properties.summary: Gets the selected rebar bending radius in the control.

properties.name: SelectedRebarGrade
properties.summary: Gets the selected rebar grade in the control.

properties.name: SelectedRebarSize
properties.summary: Gets the selected rebar size in the control.

properties.name: SelectedUsage
properties.summary: Gets the selected rebar usage in the control.

events.name: SelectClicked
events.summary: The SelectClicked event is raised when the Select button is clicked.

events.name: SelectionDone
events.summary: The SelectionDone event is raised when the selection has been done.
